title: January 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 7''' is the 7th day of the year. 358 days (359 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Paul Weston]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Jarion Monroe]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[George Buza]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Karl Kesel]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Robert Petkoff]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 26|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 26]] released.
*[[2006]] – [[Wookieepedia]] becomes Wikicities' Wiki of the Month.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Dark Times: Blue Harvest, Part 1]]'' released.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Day One]]'' was to be published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Nightsisters (episode)|Nightsisters]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – ''[[The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire]]'' Part 3 posted on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2017]] – "[[Ghosts of Geonosis]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2020]] – [[Fortnite X Star Wars|''Fortnite'' X ''Star Wars'']] ends.
*[[2025]] – "[[We're Gonna Be In So Much Trouble]]" aired on [[Disney+]].
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Empire Omnibus Vol. 3]]'' published.
*[[2026]] – [[Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon 5|''Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon'' 5]] published.
*2026 – [[Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror 4|''Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror'' 4]] published.
